# btpservice_cicd_abort_build (Action)

Aborts a running CI/CD build.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Abort a running build.
# The build must exist and be in a running state; otherwise the action returns an error.
resource "terraform_data" "abort_build" {
  lifecycle {
    action_trigger {
      events  = [after_create]
      actions = [action.btpservice_cicd_abort_build.example]
    }
  }
}

action "btpservice_cicd_abort_build" "example" {
  config {
    job   = "my-pipeline-job"
    build = "42"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `build` (String) Build sequence number or ID to abort.
- `job` (String) Name or ID of the CI/CD job that owns the build.
